channel.title: Posts on CLARK
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on CLARK

item.title: Foundation
item.description:
Foundation: Building the Future

Just like laying a strong foundation for a great structure, we’re excited to announce the initial release of Clark - a Common Lisp-based language for distributed and spatial computing.

What is Clark?

Clark brings the power of Common Lisp’s robust ecosystem, functional programming, and expressive syntax to modern distributed and spatial computing challenges. Whether you’re a seasoned Lisp developer or new to functional programming, Clark opens up new ways to build scalable, location-aware applications.
